property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: count char of name
testcase.system-out: Scenario: count char of name &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/calculator.feature:3&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma set of specific users&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CalculatorSteps.setUsers(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable)&amp#27;[0m | name | noOfcharsInName | | lalit | 5 | | anshu | 5 | | himanshu | 8 | &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mwe count the number of characters in &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"lalit"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CalculatorSteps.countCharacters(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mwe will find &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"2"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m people's with length &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"5"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CalculatorSteps.verifyPeopleWithLength(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mwe will find only &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"1"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m person with length &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"8"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.CalculatorSteps.verifyPersonWithLength(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m
